name_en: HP-350N HEATPROOF Heat Resistant Label
name_zh: HP-350N HEATPROOF 耐高温标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Dual-use label: direct hot application on hot steel and aluminum surfaces up to 400℃ (apply-to-hot), and heat treatment process management applied from room temperature then heated (apply-cold-then-heat) through annealing, homogenizing and reflow processes. Case studies: aluminum billet homogenizing (applied at room temperature, then 550℃ x 12 hours) and injection casting mold management (200〜400℃, multiple cycles). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, casting/jig management.
application_zh: 两用标签：可直接贴附于最高400℃的高温钢材和铝材表面（热贴），也可在室温贴附后经受加热（冷贴后加热），用于退火、均质化、回流焊等热处理工序的过程管理。应用案例：铝坯均质化工艺（室温贴附后550℃ x 12小时）、注射铸造模具管理（200〜400℃，多次循环）。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、铸造/治具管理。
industries: Steel | Aluminum | Ceramic | Automotive | Electronics | Casting
features_en: Application temperature up to 400℃ (can be applied to hot surfaces) | Application temperature from room temp to 400℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 600℃ | Excellent ink stability and resistance to ink smudging when applying at high temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度最高可达400℃（可直接贴附于高温表面） | 贴附温度范围：室温至400℃ | 最高耐热温度600℃ | 高温贴附时油墨稳定性优异，抗油墨晕染
benefits_en: Identify and barcode products at high temperatures, or track products through high temperature processes | Variable information and barcodes can be printed on demand with standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 可在高温下对产品进行标识和条码化，或在高温工序中跟踪产品 | 可用标准热转印打印机按需打印可变信息和条码
temperature_performance: Application temperature up to 400℃ (from room temp to 400℃); maximum heat resistance to 600℃

name_en: HP-600 HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
name_zh: HP-600 HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel and aluminum products immediately after casting/rolling, at surface temperatures from 250℃ to 600℃. Installation examples: steel hot coil at 550℃ and aluminum sow at 500℃, applied manually or with robotic labeler systems. Industries: steel, aluminum.
application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造/轧制后立即贴附于表面温度250℃至600℃的高温钢材和铝材产品。安装示例：550℃的热轧钢卷、500℃的铝锭（sow），可人工或用机器人贴标系统贴附。行业：钢铁、铝业。
features_en: Application temperature from 250℃ to 600℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 600℃ | Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：250℃至600℃ | 最高耐热温度600℃ | 热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Identify and barcode hot coils soon after rolling; products can be accurately identified and verified downstream using barcode scanners | Labels printed on demand or pre-printed using standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 轧制后即可对热轧卷进行标识和条码化；下游工序可用条码扫描器准确识别和核验产品 | 可用标准热转印打印机按需打印或预印标签
temperature_performance: Application temperature from 250℃ to 600℃; maximum heat resistance to 600℃

name_en: HP-700T HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
name_zh: HP-700T HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel products immediately after casting, at surface temperatures from 450℃ to 800℃. Installation examples: steel slab at 800℃, steel billet at 750℃, steel bloom at 800℃, applied with robotic labeler systems. Industries: steel, aluminum.
application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造后立即贴附于表面温度450℃至800℃的高温钢材产品。安装示例：800℃钢板坯（slab）、750℃钢坯（billet）、800℃大方坯（bloom），可用机器人贴标系统贴附。行业：钢铁、铝业。
features_en: Application temperature from 450℃ to 800℃ | Heat resistance up to 800℃ | Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：450℃至800℃ | 耐热温度最高800℃ | 热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Automatically identify each hot slab/billet with visually clear identification and barcodes | Verify product identity downstream using barcode scanners, cameras or imaging systems
benefits_zh: 自动对每块热板坯/钢坯进行清晰可视的标识和条码识别 | 下游工序可用条码扫描器、相机或成像系统核验产品身份
temperature_performance: Application temperature from 450℃ to 800℃; heat resistance up to 800℃

name_en: HP-900 HEATPROOF Label for Direct Hot Application
name_zh: HP-900 HEATPROOF 高温直贴标签
application_en: Direct hot application (apply-to-hot) on hot steel and aluminum products immediately after casting, at surface temperatures from 450℃ up to 900℃ (highest application temperature in the HEATPROOF direct hot application lineup). Industries: steel, aluminum.
application_zh: 高温直贴（热贴）标签，可在铸造后立即贴附于表面温度450℃至最高900℃的高温钢材和铝材产品（HEATPROOF高温直贴系列中贴附温度最高的型号）。行业：钢铁、铝业。
features_en: Application temperature from 450℃ to 900℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 900℃ | Heat activated adhesive (activated by hot direct application)
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：450℃至900℃ | 最高耐热温度900℃ | 热活化型胶粘剂（通过高温直贴激活）
benefits_en: Products can be accurately identified and verified in downstream processes using barcode scanners | Labels printed on demand or pre-printed using standard thermal transfer printers
benefits_zh: 下游工序可用条码扫描器准确识别和核验产品 | 可用标准热转印打印机按需打印或预印标签
temperature_performance: Application temperature from 450℃ to 900℃; maximum heat resistance to 900℃

name_en: HP-120S HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management
name_zh: HP-120S HEATPROOF 热处理过程管理标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Heat treatment process management: applied from room temperature (apply-cold-then-heat) and tracked through reheat processes up to 220℃. Case study: identification of injection casting molds through 200〜400℃ multi-cycle heating (used alongside HP-150N/HP-350N). Industries: steel, aluminum, ceramic, automotive, electronics, casting/jig and asset management.
application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签：室温贴附（冷贴后加热），可在最高220℃的再加热工序中跟踪产品。应用案例：注射铸造模具在200〜400℃多次循环加热中的标识管理（与HP-150N/HP-350N配合使用）。行业：钢铁、铝业、陶瓷、汽车、电子、铸造/治具及资产管理。
industries: Steel | Aluminum | Ceramic | Automotive | Electronics | Casting
features_en: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃ | Maximum heat resistance to 220℃ | Chemical resistance | Strong initial adhesion | Excellent ink stability and resistance to smudging at higher application temperatures
features_zh: 贴附温度范围：室温至220℃ | 最高耐热温度220℃ | 耐化学性 | 初粘力强 | 较高贴附温度下油墨稳定性优异、抗晕染
benefits_en: Scan barcodes into and out of reheat furnaces; printed information and barcodes remain intact through the reheat process | Labels can be die-cut to any size and printed on site
benefits_zh: 进出再加热炉均可扫描条码；打印信息和条码在再加热过程中保持完好 | 标签可模切成任意尺寸并现场打印
temperature_performance: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃; maximum heat resistance to 220℃

industries: Steel | Aluminum | Ceramic | Automotive | Electronics | Concrete | Casting

features_zh: 贴附温度范围：室温至220℃ | 最高耐热温度220℃ | 耐化学性高于HP-120S | 初粘力强于HP-120S | 较高贴附温度下油墨稳定性优异、抗晕染
benefits_en: Survives autoclave processes (10MPa, up to 200℃) with barcodes remaining scannable, enabling accurate inventory tracking | Printed information and barcodes remain intact through the reheat process
benefits_zh: 可耐受蒸压工艺（10MPa、最高200℃），条码仍可扫描，实现准确的库存跟踪 | 打印信息和条码在再加热过程中保持完好
temperature_performance: Application temperature from room temp to 220℃; maximum heat resistance to 220℃

name_en: HP-CBR CX2 HEATPROOF Label for Heat Treatment Process Management
name_zh: HP-CBR CX2 HEATPROOF 热处理过程管理标签
adhesive_en: Pressure-sensitive adhesive (category-level statement on Labels for Heat Treatment page)
adhesive_zh: 压敏胶（“热处理用标签”品类页的整体说明）
application_en: Heat treatment process management (apply-cold-then-heat) up to 1200℃; after the baking process the label becomes integrated with the substrate surface. Case studies: management of ceramic products (alumina, glass, carbon) and laboratory crucibles at 1,000℃ for several to a dozen hours (used alongside HP-CBR HB). Industries: ceramic, steel, aluminum, electronics, casting/jig and asset management.
application_zh: 热处理过程管理标签（冷贴后加热），最高耐热1200℃；经烧成工序后标签与基材表面融为一体。应用案例：陶瓷产品（氧化铝、玻璃、碳）及实验室坩埚在1,000℃下数小时至十余小时的管理（与HP-CBR HB配合使用）。行业：陶瓷、钢铁、铝业、电子、铸造/治具及资产管理。
features_en: Maximum heat resistance to 1200℃ | High flexibility | After baking process, label becomes integrated with substrate surface | Good durability against scratching, pickling, impact, and multiple heat cycles

features_en: Micro-channels formed on the adhesive surface by an original manufacturing process which allows air-releasing feature | UL969-compliant and usable for nameplates on electrical products | Release paper: wood-free paper with double-side polyethylene laminate (ivory)
features_zh: 通过独创制造工艺在胶面形成微通道，具备排气功能 | 符合UL969标准，可用于电气产品铭板 | 离型纸：双面聚乙烯淋膜道林纸（象牙色）
benefits_en: Easy to apply and enables perfect bubble-free label application | Air-release mechanism for volatile gases in plastics such as ABS and PC prevents air-bubble formation beneath the label
benefits_zh: 易于贴附，可实现完全无气泡的标签贴合 | 针对ABS、PC等塑料释放的挥发气体具有排气机制，防止标签下产生气泡

name_en: Bubble-free labelstock MC5080
name_zh: 无气泡标签材料 MC5080
facestock_en: Metalized polyester film (silver matt / matt texture with top coat) 50µm
facestock_zh: 镀铝聚酯薄膜（银色亚光/带面涂层的亚光质感）50µm
application_en: Nameplates and display labels applied to consumer electronics and electronic devices; large-format labels which require outgassing resistance
application_zh: 家电及电子设备的铭板和显示标签；需要耐排气性能的大幅面标签

benefits_en: Easy to apply and enables perfect bubble-free label application | Air-release mechanism for volatile gases in plastics such as ABS and PC prevents air-bubble formation beneath the label

name_en: Lock-tight labelstock ML806B
name_zh: 自锁式（Lock-tight）标签材料 ML806B
facestock_en: Polypropylene (PP) film (white), matt-type polypropylene film suitable for printing
facestock_zh: 聚丙烯（PP）薄膜（白色），适合印刷的亚光型聚丙烯薄膜
adhesive_en: Special adhesive (adhesive has no tack; bonds when adhesive surfaces are attached together)
adhesive_zh: 特殊胶粘剂（胶面本身无粘性，胶面对贴后即牢固粘接）
application_en: Price tag-labels for items such as glasses, rings, necklaces and other precious products; suitcase or bag tag-labels; wristbands and other ID tags
application_zh: 眼镜、戒指、项链等贵重商品的价格吊牌标签；行李箱或提包吊牌标签；腕带及其他识别（ID）吊牌
features_en: Attaching adhesive surfaces together increases their bonding strength | Adhesive itself has no tack and can be used without sticking to the products | Suitability for printing and converting is the same as that of an ordinary labelstock | Release film: polypropylene (PP) film (clear)
features_zh: 胶面对贴可提高粘接强度 | 胶粘剂本身无粘性，使用时不会粘到商品上 | 印刷和加工适性与普通标签材料相同 | 离型膜：聚丙烯（PP）薄膜（透明）
benefits_en: Ideal for display cards and price tags without sticking to merchandise
benefits_zh: 不粘商品，是展示卡和价格吊牌的理想选择

name_en: Oil-tolerant labelstock OT8060
name_zh: 耐油面标签材料 OT8060
application_en: Identification labels for steel, automobile components (such as rust-proofed oily surfaces) and similar applications; general labels for cosmetic- and food-related items
application_zh: 钢材、汽车零部件（如防锈油面）等的识别标签；化妆品和食品相关物品的一般标签
features_en: Oil absorption by the adhesive provides good adherence, even to oily surfaces | Printable with conventional ink and/or thermal transfer ribbons | Release paper: blue glassine paper
features_zh: 胶粘剂可吸收油分，即使在带油表面也能良好粘附 | 可使用常规油墨和/或热转印碳带打印 | 离型纸：蓝色格拉辛纸
benefits_en: Directly applicable to oily surfaces, which improves process efficiency by eliminating surface cleaning processes
benefits_zh: 可直接贴附于带油表面，省去表面清洁工序，提高工艺效率

name_en: Oil-tolerant labelstock OT5040
name_zh: 耐油面标签材料 OT5040

name_en: Cryogenic labelstock CY5040
name_zh: 超低温（冷冻保存）标签材料 CY5040
application_en: Medical identification labels for ampules, vials or other containers kept at extremely low temperature
application_zh: 用于超低温保存的安瓿瓶、西林瓶及其他容器的医用识别标签
features_en: Permanent adhesive is used to provide excellent adhesion to curved surfaces | Allows printing by conventional presses, thermal transfer or laser printing | For thermal transfer printing
features_zh: 采用永久型胶粘剂，对曲面具有优异的粘附性 | 可采用传统印刷、热转印或激光打印 | 适用于热转印打印
benefits_en: Reliable identification on specimens kept at extremely low temperatures
benefits_zh: 在超低温保存的样本上仍可实现可靠标识

name_en: Cryogenic labelstock CY5030
name_zh: 超低温（冷冻保存）标签材料 CY5030

name_en: Removable labelstock (high adhesion type) RE5014
name_zh: 可移除标签材料（高粘型）RE5014
facestock_zh: 镀铝聚酯薄膜（银色高光）50µm
application_en: Cosmetics, household goods, consumer electronics and other POP/eye-catching labels, and many display labels
application_zh: 化妆品、家居用品、家电等的POP/促销吸睛标签及各类展示标签
features_en: High-adhesion, removable labelstock providing reliable adhesion to plastic and other containers, while peeling-off cleanly on demand and leaving little adhesive behind | Uses a highly versatile adhesive compatible with various surfaces, including glass, polyester and polypropylene | Release paper: blue glassine paper
features_zh: 高粘可移除型标签材料，对塑料等容器粘附可靠，需要时可干净剥离且几乎不残胶 | 采用通用性强的胶粘剂，适用于玻璃、聚酯、聚丙烯等多种表面 | 离型纸：蓝色格拉辛纸
benefits_en: Higher adhesion strength than ordinary removable adhesives, leaving no concern for failure during use | Assists in reuse and recycling of containers and other items
benefits_zh: 粘接强度高于普通可移除胶粘剂，使用中无脱落之忧 | 有助于容器等物品的再利用和回收

name_en: Removable labelstock (low adhesion type) RE503S
name_zh: 可移除标签材料（低粘型）RE503S
adhesive_zh: 低粘型有机硅（硅胶）胶粘剂
application_en: Restaurant/convenience store commercial window posters, showcase POP/eye-catching labels, consumer electronic POP/eye-catching labels, and decoration labels
application_zh: 餐厅/便利店商用橱窗海报、展示柜POP/吸睛标签、家电POP/吸睛标签及装饰标签
features_en: Minimizes residual air when label is applied and allows simple application on relatively large-surface labels | Possesses high wetting ability between smooth surface and adhesive; suitable surfaces are glass, acrylic and polycarbonate | Extra smooth release paper used to increase smoothness of adhesive surface, providing superior design properties (clear type) | Product design with excellent dimensional stability provides good flatness for sheet applications and also suits offset printing | Release paper: white wood-free paper
features_zh: 贴附时残留空气极少，较大面积标签也能轻松贴附 | 胶粘剂与光滑表面之间润湿性高；适用表面为玻璃、亚克力和聚碳酸酯 | 采用超平滑离型纸提升胶面平滑度，具有出色的外观设计效果（透明型） | 尺寸稳定性优异，单张应用平整度好，同时适合胶印 | 离型纸：白色道林纸
benefits_en: Allows simple application and clean removal of even comparatively large-area labels
benefits_zh: 即使较大面积的标签也能轻松贴附并干净移除

name_en: Same surface material labelstock (PE, PP type) KEE70CA P2041
name_zh: 同材质标签材料（PE、PP型）KEE70CA P2041
application_en: Display labels for mayonnaise and other soft squeeze bottles; display labels for shampoo and other semi-squeeze bottles
application_zh: 蛋黄酱等软质挤压瓶的展示标签；洗发水等半挤压瓶的展示标签
features_en: Flexible labelstock with excellent follow-up ability to curved surfaces | Allows auto-application by labelling machines, UV printing, and other operations providing a broad range of label uses | Use of identical material for label as the container components which can be directly recycled without peeling process | Material indication: >PE<
features_zh: 柔性标签材料，对曲面具有优异的贴合追随性 | 支持贴标机自动贴标、UV印刷等多种加工方式，标签用途广泛 | 标签与容器部件采用同一材质，无需剥离即可直接回收 | 材质标识：>PE<
benefits_en: Promotes recycling and reuse of molded plastic items without label removal
benefits_zh: 无需去除标签即可促进塑料成型品的回收与再利用

name_zh: 同材质标签材料（PS、ABS型）KES65WA PAT1
application_en: Labels for copying machines, laser printers and other office equipment; labels for televisions, air conditioners and other consumer electronic goods
application_zh: 复印机、激光打印机等办公设备用标签；电视机、空调等家电产品用标签

facestock_zh: 聚苯乙烯（PS）薄膜，透明亚光
application_en: Labels for copying machines, laser printers and other office equipment; labels for televisions, air conditioners and other consumer electronic goods
application_zh: 复印机、激光打印机等办公设备用标签；电视机、空调等家电产品用标签
features_en: Recyclable even with labels attached | Removable adhesive is assigned when labels need to be removed upon reuse | Material indication: >PS< | UL/CUL Recognition No. 8125AX25
features_zh: 贴有标签也可直接回收 | 如再利用时需要移除标签，可选用可移除型胶粘剂 | 材质标识：>PS< | UL/CUL认证编号 8125AX25
benefits_en: Allows selection of recycling and reusing methods for molded plastic covers
benefits_zh: 可根据需要选择塑料外壳的回收或再利用方式

name_en: Recycled film labelstock (PET type) KP5000
name_zh: 再生薄膜标签材料（PET型）KP5000
facestock_en: Clear polyester (PET) film 50µm, made by mechanical recycling of PET bottles; recycled PET resin content more than 80%
facestock_zh: 透明聚酯（PET）薄膜50µm，采用PET瓶“物理再生（mechanical recycling）”工艺制成；再生PET树脂含量超过80%
application_en: POP labels, eye-catching labels, general labels, and similar items for daily necessities, cosmetics, consumer electronic goods, and many other products
application_zh: 日用品、化妆品、家电等各类产品的POP标签、吸睛标签、一般标签等
features_en: Recycled PET resin content in facestock is more than 80% | Manufacturing process of this PET film produces approximately 24% lower CO2 emissions than alternative methods | Material properties equivalent to those of virgin PET film-based labelstock | Approved by the Council for PET Bottle Recycling (Japanese domestic organization) for its recycled PET resin content standard | Release paper: siliconised single-sided polyethylene laminated glassine paper (blue) | Material indication: >PET<
features_zh: 面材中再生PET树脂含量超过80% | 该PET薄膜的制造工艺较其他方法可减少约24%的CO2排放 | 材料性能与原生PET薄膜标签材料相当 | 其再生PET树脂含量符合日本PET瓶回收协议会（Council for PET Bottle Recycling）标准并获认可 | 离型纸：单面聚乙烯淋膜硅化格拉辛纸（蓝色） | 材质标识：>PET<
benefits_en: Closed-loop use of resources reduces depletion of petroleum resources and reduces environmental impacts
benefits_zh: 资源闭环利用，减少石油资源消耗并降低环境负荷

name_en: CHILL AT hot-melt adhesive labelstock for chilled environments
name_zh: CHILL AT 低温（冷藏）环境用热熔胶标签材料
adhesive_en: Hot-melt adhesive (based on hot-melt adhesive formulation technology of U.S. subsidiary Mactac Americas LLC)
adhesive_zh: 热熔胶（基于美国子公司Mactac Americas LLC的热熔胶配方技术）
application_en: Labelstock for chilled environments; adopted for food products as well as a wide range of other applications (Japanese market, launched 2020)
application_zh: 冷藏环境用标签材料；已用于食品及其他广泛用途（2020年在日本市场全面上市）
features_en: Environmentally friendly labelstock utilizing hot-melt adhesive | Hot-melt adhesives are solid at room temperature and are melted by heat for application; no organic solvents are used in the coating process and no drying process is required
features_zh: 采用热熔胶的环保型标签材料 | 热熔胶常温下为固体、加热熔融后涂布；涂布过程不使用有机溶剂，也无需干燥工序
benefits_en: Produces less CO2 during manufacturing
benefits_zh: 制造过程CO2排放更少
